eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: Scrollbar
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
description: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
An example of scroll view can be found in the [multiplayer custom lobbies](https://wiki.gdevelop.io/gdevelop5/extensions/multiplayer-custom-lobbies/) extension.

eventsBasedObjects.description: A scrollbar to help making a scroll view.
eventsBasedObjects.name: Scrollbar

events.comment: Make sure the ScrollPosition don't go over the limit when the limit when the parent is resized.

parameters: clamp(Background.Y(), Background.Y() + Background.Height(), Background.Y() + ScrollPosition * Background.Height() / ContentLength)

eventsFunctions.description: the content length of the object. The length of the content to scroll. The scroll bar don't actually scroll the content. You have to do it yourself with camera actions.
eventsFunctions.name: ContentLength

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the thumb of the scrollbar is dragged.
eventsFunctions.name: IsThumbDragged

eventsFunctions.description: Check if the content is big enough to require scrolling.
eventsFunctions.name: IsScrollingRequired
eventsFunctions.sentence: The content of _PARAM0_ is big enough to require scrolling

propertyDescriptors.label: Content length
propertyDescriptors.description: The length of the content to scroll. The scroll bar don't actually scroll the content. You have to do it yourself with camera actions.
propertyDescriptors.name: ContentLength

propertyDescriptors.label: Hide the bar when the content is too small
propertyDescriptors.name: ShouldHideWhenUseless
